faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Flatbush?
faqs.answer: Ant control services in Flatbush typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, the extent of the infestation, and the type of ant species involved. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before starting any treatment.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Flatbush homes?
faqs.answer: Flatbush residents commonly encounter pavement ants, carpenter ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning in older Flatbush homes as they can damage wooden structures. Our technicians identify the species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment method.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide ant control service in Flatbush?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day ant control services throughout Flatbush, Brooklyn. Most treatments can be scheduled within 24 hours of your call, and our technicians typically complete initial treatments in 1-2 hours depending on the property size and infestation severity.

faqs.question: Are your ant control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved, family-friendly ant control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We can also provide completely organic treatment options upon request for Flatbush families seeking chemical-free solutions.
